audit_score_rationale: All 24 block-severity linter checks pass cleanly with zero warns. Page mirrors the sibling state-tax exemplar's structure precisely (masthead → breadcrumb → eyebrow → partner-badge → h1 → subhead → last-reviewed → G2 row → CTA → hero → chip-nav → capsule → 7 Q sections → pullquote → tagline-close → links-rail → meta-footer → customer-strip). Inline stamp-block visual satisfies the inline-visual requirement and reinforces the Alabama-only child-labour rule visually. Hero photo from Unsplash (Lance Asper, Birmingham AL) 124KB. Federal-only data with no statutory uncertainty.

retrofit_needed.notes: United States parent and Alabama state parent are wave-3/wave-4 — link-gate has rendered them as plain text. Promote to anchors when those pages ship.

page_specific_notes: Page leads with the practical employer point — Alabama defers to federal law on nearly everything (per row-prompt guidance)
The one Alabama-only rule (14-15 yr meal break, $300-$5,000 penalty) is given a dedicated section with stamp-block visual
Multi-state-employer section explicitly contrasts Alabama floor with CA/NY/Oregon/Washington higher mandates

Overtime tax line (2024 exclusion expired, 2026-2028 $1,000 deduction) included as a confusion-prevention paragraph in the overtime Q-section but the page is wage-and-hour, not tax — links to state-tax sibling for full detail
Cost-page conditional rule satisfied via 'passes through at cost, itemised on every invoice' anchor in how-teamed-handles section
